identity.name: Casa Amatller
identity.address: Pg. de Gràcia, 41, Eixample, 08007 Barcelona, Spain

discovery.text: Verified for Passeig de Gràcia: Casa Amatller is one of the key modernista façades that makes the boulevard legible as architecture, patronage, and display.

narrative.summary: A core modernista house museum on Passeig de Gràcia's most important architectural block.
